Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava.MultimapValidator

Packages that use MultimapValidator 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.

  • Uses of MultimapValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return MultimapValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <K,​ V> MultimapValidator<K,​V> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.
    <K,​ V> MultimapValidator<K,​V> Requirements.validateThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.

  • Uses of MultimapValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava that return MultimapValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.entries​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Collection<Map.Entry<K,​V>>,​Map.Entry<K,​V>>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.keySet​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Set<K>,​K>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.size​(Consumer<SizeValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    <K,​ V> MultimapValidator<K,​V> GuavaRequirements.validateThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.values​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Collection<V>,​V>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
